current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Majority of Quadratic Products
current_run.description: This problem defines a secret integer s. For an N-bit input x, the function f(x) computes the majority of the products of adjacent pairs of bits in x, with a cyclic wrap-around for the last and first bits, and then adds the secret s. The function returns 1 if the result is odd, and 0 if it is even. The goal is to find the secret s.
